items.name: ng-core
items.title: Core
items.description: Shared utilities, design tokens, and the Button primitive.

items.name: ng-ai
items.title: AI (Angular)
items.description: AI primitives for Angular - PromptInput family with state machine and drag-drop, plus composable Attachments parts. The cornerstone of any AI chat surface.

items.name: ng-containers
items.title: Containers (Angular)
items.description: Container primitives - ScrollArea wrapper over ngx-scrollbar styled to match Gremorie.

items.name: ng-data
items.title: Data (Angular)
items.description: Data visualisation primitives - charts on D3, headless plus styled presets (area, line, bar, scatter, pie, radar, radial).

items.name: rx-core
items.title: Core (React)
items.description: React cross-category utilities - cn() helper for class name merging with Tailwind conflict resolution.

items.name: rx-ai
items.title: AI (React)
items.description: React AI primitives - PromptInput family with state machine and drag-drop (pilot edition). Cornerstone of any AI chat surface.
